summary: Complete testing of new Debt Management module. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all features verified.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent}. This is a minor accessibility warning, not a functional issue.

backend: GET /api/debts - List all debts returns proper array
GET /api/debts with debt_type filter works correctly
GET /api/debts/summary/overview - Returns receivables, payables, aging, net_position
POST /api/debts - Create receivable with 'other' party type
POST /api/debts - Create payable debt with AED currency, USD conversion verified
POST /api/debts - Create receivable linked to existing client (party_name auto-filled)
POST /api/debts - Create payable linked to existing vendor (party_name auto-filled)
GET /api/debts/{debt_id} - Returns full details with calculated_status, outstanding_balance, payments[]
POST /api/debts/{debt_id}/payments - Record partial payment, status changes to partially_paid
POST /api/debts/{debt_id}/payments - Record full payment, status changes to fully_paid
GET /api/debts/{debt_id} with payments - Payment history array populated
Interest calculation - Overdue debt shows correct accrued_interest using formula: principal * (annual_rate/100/365) * days_overdue
Filter by status - GET /api/debts?status=overdue returns only overdue debts
frontend: Summary cards: Total Receivables, Total Payables, Net Position, Overdue Amount, Accrued Interest all visible
Aging Summary section with 5 buckets: Current, 1-30 Days, 31-60 Days, 61-90 Days, 90+ Days
Receivables (Debtors) tab present and active by default
Payables (Creditors) tab present and switches correctly
Add Receivable/Payable button text changes based on active tab
Add Receivable dialog: Party Type dropdown with Other/Client/Vendor options
Add Receivable dialog: Client selector appears when party_type=client
Add Receivable dialog: All form fields present (amount, currency, due date, interest rate, reference, description)
Table columns: Party, Amount, Paid, Outstanding, Interest, Due Date, Status, Actions
Status badges: PARTIALLY_PAID (blue), FULLY_PAID (green) rendering correctly
Actions dropdown menu with View Details and Record Payment options
View Details dialog: Shows Party, Type, Original Amount, Total Paid, Outstanding, Due Date, Status, Description
View Details dialog: Payment History section present with payment records
Record Payment dialog: Shows Party name, Outstanding balance, Amount, Currency, Payment Date, Treasury Account, Reference, Notes
Record Payment dialog: Amount pre-filled with outstanding balance

seed_data_creation: Test created 3 receivable debts (TEST_Acme Corp x2, TEST_Full Payment Corp) during backend testing. These have payments and cannot be deleted. System already had: 1 client (safvan kappilakath), 1 vendor (kenway), 2 treasury accounts (ENBD AED, ICIC INR).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Debt Management module fully tested. Backend API endpoints: /api/debts (CRUD), /api/debts/{id}/payments, /api/debts/summary/overview. Frontend at /debts route. Interest uses simple interest formula. Party can be linked to clients/vendors or be standalone 'other' type. Status auto-calculated: pending, partially_paid, fully_paid, overdue. Currency exchange rates are MOCKED in backend/server.py.

summary_cards.total_receivables: Shows sum of outstanding receivables in USD
summary_cards.total_payables: Shows sum of outstanding payables in USD
summary_cards.net_position: Receivables - Payables, shows Net Receivable or Net Payable
summary_cards.accrued_interest: Sum of calculated interest on overdue debts

aging_summary.calculation: Based on days past due date

debt_creation.fields: debt_type, party_type, party_id, party_name, amount, currency, due_date, interest_rate, description, reference, treasury_account_id
debt_creation.auto_features: Party name auto-filled from client/vendor, USD conversion calculated

payment_recording.fields: amount, currency, payment_date, treasury_account_id, reference, notes
payment_recording.effects: Updates total_paid, payment_count, status (partially_paid/fully_paid), treasury balance

interest_calculation.triggers: Only calculated when debt is overdue (past due_date)

status_calculation.partially_paid: Some payment made, not fully paid
status_calculation.overdue: Past due date and not fully paid

mocked_api.currency_exchange_rates: EXCHANGE_RATES_TO_USD in backend/server.py - hardcoded rates for USD, EUR, GBP, AED, SAR, INR, JPY, USDT
